titleStmt.title: SII 26.198: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 198. (A.R. No. 186 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a grant of the village of Taṉavāśi alias Vīrachōḻanallūr in Kīṭpā-nāḍu, made by the king, on the occasion of his coronation, to the goddess Peruṅkaruṇaichchelviyār of the Tirukkāmakōṭṭam in the temple of the god Avināśiyāḷuḍaiyār. The gift is stated to have been made to a certain Mādēvāṇḍār. Also states that the taxes levied from the village should be received by the servants of the goddess only and the king's officials like the sāmantas and others should not enter the village. The record further states that in regard to the colonising of the village, the above-mentioned Mādēvāṇḍār would decide on the families to be brought into the village, and that the inhabitants of the village themselves should measure out oil, etc., in the office of the goddess's shrine.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrājakesari koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭai
yāravināciyāḷuṭaiyār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu nācci
yār peruṅkaruṇaiccelviyār tevakaṉmikaḷukku nammolai
kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Innācciyāṟkku muppatiraṇṭu Aṟtattukku
m pūcaikkum mutalāka nām kuṭutta Ūr kiṭpānāṭṭut taṉavā
ciyāṉa viracoḻanallūr mātevāṇṭār kaiyyile nām Utakam
paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ivvūr nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey
puṉceyyāluḷḷa Iṟai puravu ciṟṟāyam Elavai yukavai maṉṟupāṭu
teṇṭa kuṟṟam cumai cuṅkam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭiṉavum Innācci
yār tevakaṉmikaḷe koṇṭu varuvārkaḷākavum nam cāmantar kaṉmika
ḷ pukkak kaṭavarkaḷallavākavum Ivvūril paṭappai Aṇainta paṭṭitta
ṟaiyile mā� vāṇṭar makkaḷ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉuḷḷiṭṭā
ṟku kaṇṇaṅkalakkaṇappitai Iṟaiyimuṟṟūṭṭāka Ivarkaḷ ma
kkaḷ makkaḷ Aṉupavittu varuvārkaḷākavum Ivvūṟku Uriya kuṭiyeṟu
vatākavum Uriyakuṭi Eṟittilakaḷākil mātevāṇṭār tamakku veṇ
ṭiṉa kuṭiparappārku kataivacikaḷaiyiṭṭu Ēṟṟikkoḷvārāka
vum Ivvūril Eṟiṉa kuṭikaḷukku Iṟaikuṭiyāl kāṇaṅkalak kaṇappum
tuḷaikālpponnum kā Irunāḻi Eṇṇalaiyumāka Ivviṟai kuṭi
makkaḷ tāṅkaḷe Eṭuttik koṇṭu vantu Innācciyār koṭṭakkāratti
le Aḷantu koṭuppārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatā
kac cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum
nām Apiṣekam paṇṇiṉa muhuttattile Ivvūr tāṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttom
Ivai coḻakulamāṇikka muventaveḷāneḻuttu .§ yāṇ
ṭiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ nāṟpattāṟu .§ Ivai yilāṭattaraiyaṉ Eḻut
tu .§ Ivai cetiyarāyaneḻuttu .§ Ivai muṉaiyataraiyaneḻuttu .§ I
vai Iruṅkoṉneḻuttu .§ Ivai kāṭuveṭṭiyeḻuttu .§
Ittaṉmam
Ittai Aḻivuceyvāṉ Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
